creator: tkato@prontomail.ne.jp
text:
It seems that several portion of this PR, such as kanji18 and kanji26, 
are already exist in FreeBSD ports.

And then, I guess X11 font file ports should be as an individual port 
per typeface and size.


-- 
KATO Tsuguru / tkato@prontomail.ne.jp
                     
Sent by Japanese ProntoMail
